title: Software Engineer to Credit Decisions team

summary.lv: Swedbank meklē programmatūras inženieri/-i Kredītu lēmumu komandai, kurš/-a attīstīs un uzturēs kompleksus kreditēšanas risinājumus Baltijas tirgū.
summary.en: Swedbank seeks a Software Engineer for the Credit Decisions team to develop and maintain complex lending solutions across the Baltic market.
